en.title: Why This Blog Uses a Monochrome System
en.excerpt: A short design note about keeping the portfolio quiet, readable, and focused on work.
en.content:
# Why This Blog Uses a Monochrome System

A restrained interface keeps the emphasis on projects and writing. Use contrast, spacing, typography, and motion before adding decoration.

## Design Rules

- Keep the palette close to black, white, and neutral gray.
- Use readable sections over decorative panels.
- Let project links and writing carry the focus.
